diff: After receiving the implementation proposal, the Core Facilitator shares it with the relevant stakeholders whose needs originated the request. The Core Facilitator works with these stakeholders to confirm that the implementation proposal addresses the needs that motivated the novel Spell item. After doing so, the Core Facilitator schedules the novel Spell item into the regular Spell cadence as specified in [A.1.9.2.4 - Executive Process Breakdown](98298ab3-8d08-4c4f-b47b-81242a3e3903).
summary: Add Process For Novel Spell Items
description: Adds a definition and process for assessing and including novel Spell items in Executive Votes.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
